revision.comment: remove content categories per [[WP:CAT#T]]; move to [[Category:Japan sidebar templates]] (via [[WP:JWB]])
revision.text:
{{sidebar | name = Japanese mythology sidebar | pretitle = Part of the series on | title = [[Japanese mythology]] | image = [[Image:Amaterasu_cave_wide.jpg|140px|center]]
| bodyclass = hlist | headingstyle = border-top:solid 1px #aaa
| content1 = * [[Religion in Japan|Religions]] * [[List of divinities in Japanese mythology|Divinities]]
| heading2 = [[Japanese mythology|Texts and myths]] | content2 = * [[Kojiki]] * [[Nihon Shoki]] * [[Kujiki]] * [[Hotsuma Tsutae]] * [[Nihon Ryōiki]] * [[Konjaku Monogatarishū]]
| heading3 = [[List of sacred objects in Japanese mythology|Sacred objects]] | content3 = * [[Amenonuhoko]] * [[Sessho-seki|Sesshō-seki]] * [[Tonbokiri]] * [[Imperial Regalia of Japan|Three Sacred Treasures]]
| heading4 = Mythical locations | content4 = * [[Ryūgū-jō]] * [[Yomi]] * [[Takamagahara]] }}<noinclude> [[Category:Japan sidebar templates|Mythology]] [[Category:Mythology sidebar templates|Japanese mythology sidebar]] </noinclude>

{{sidebar | name = Japanese mythology sidebar | pretitle = Part of the series on | title = [[Japanese mythology]] | image = [[Image:Amaterasu_cave_wide.jpg|140px|center]]
| bodyclass = hlist | headingstyle = border-top:solid 1px #aaa
| content1 = * [[Religion in Japan|Religions]] * [[List of divinities in Japanese mythology|Divinities]]
| heading2 = [[Japanese mythology|Texts and myths]] | content2 = * [[Kojiki]] * [[Nihon Shoki]] * [[Kujiki]] * [[Hotsuma Tsutae]] * [[Nihon Ryōiki]] * [[Konjaku Monogatarishū]]
| heading3 = [[List of sacred objects in Japanese mythology|Sacred objects]] | content3 = * [[Amenonuhoko]] * [[Sessho-seki|Sesshō-seki]] * [[Tonbokiri]] * [[Imperial Regalia of Japan|Three Sacred Treasures]]
| heading4 = Mythical locations | content4 = * [[Ryūgū-jō]] * [[Yomi]] * [[Takamagahara]] }}<noinclude> [[Category:Japan sidebar templates|Mythology]] [[Category:Mythology sidebar templates|Japanese mythology sidebar]] </noinclude>

| heading4 = Mythical locations | content4 = * [[Ryūgū-jō]] * [[Yomi]] * [[Takamagahara]] }}<noinclude> [[Category:Japan sidebar templates|Mythology]] [[Category:Mythology sidebar templates|Japanese mythology sidebar]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{sidebar | name = Japanese mythology sidebar | pretitle = Part of the series on | title = [[Japanese mythology]] | image = [[Image:Amaterasu_cave_wide.jpg|140px|center]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23468259453|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{sidebar | name = Japanese mythology sidebar | pretitle = Part of the series on | title = [[Japanese mythology]] | image = [[Image:Amaterasu_cave_wide.jpg|140px|center]]
